fail_reasons: 0/10 nonzero coefficients — explicit pre-reg failure gate hit

false_positive_caution.note: Lo-adj Sharpe 0.78 and excess vs SPY +7.3%/y NET are misleading. With 0/10 coefs, the Lasso predicts the mean (no cross-sectional signal). 'Top-30 by score' is essentially arbitrary among rows with tied predictions. The +0.78 Sharpe is structural noise from the bull regime 2024-2026 universe-average behavior, NOT alpha. The HAC alpha t-stat of 0.05 confirms zero signal once Carhart-4F factor exposure is removed.

comparison_to_prior_class.v4_v2_finding: Substituting 8 of 21 features with literature-pedigreed alt-data signals (Foster SUE, PEAD, Diether-Lee-Werner short interest, days-to-cover, filing density, downside skew rank, decay multipliers) did NOT change the Lasso L1 + CV-MSE outcome. 4 of 4 experiments across this target/universe/holdout produce zero-coef structural artifacts.

research_program_status.this_was: 11th paradigm failure since 2026-04-25 strategic pivot (2026-04-29 mom_lowvol + tri-factor + 2026-04-30 quality_momentum + vol-target overlay + multi_source_two_stage v1+v2+v3 + alt_data v2)
